---
title: "The Link Function Problem"
subtitle: "why All Interactions Are Wrong (no, I'm joking... but probably a great deal of them are actually wrong)"
author: "toffa feat pippo & the curly one x psicostat"
include-in-header: figures/header.html
format: 
  html:
    self-contained: true
    toc: true   
    toc-depth: 3 
    toc-expand: 3 
    code-fold: false 
    message: false
editor: visual
---

<a href="0.SlideNonGaussian.html" target=_blank>(Non)Normal distributions</a>

<a href="" target=_blank>Are all interactions wrong?</a>
